title: codengine module package
description: A portable, source-free distributable of one module: its description contract (task definitions) plus one or more artifacts (source or compiled), each bound to a transport. The build output of a manifest's module. Consumed by a loader at run-time. Version 1.

kind.description: Discriminates a module package from a bundle.

name.description: The module namespace this package provides.

provenance.description: How the package was built (for reproducibility and supply-chain review).

definitions.description: Relative path to the description contract (a task-definition document, see task-definition.schema.json).

dependencies.description: Other module packages this one requires.

artifacts.description: One entry per target/ABI. A run-time consumer picks the artifact whose transport its environment supports.

target.description: Deployment target: "any", "wasm", or a platform id (e.g. "darwin-arm64"). Open string.

transport.description: The transport that can drive this artifact. Open string; known values: "in-process", "subprocess", "remote", "wasm", "cffi".

language.description: Language of this artifact, if it differs from the package (e.g. a cross-compiled form). Defaults to the package language.

files.description: Relative paths to the artifact's files (source or binaries). Required for local transports; omitted for a purely remote artifact.

root.description: The artifact's dependency environment inside the package (relative path).

entry.description: How the executor reaches the functions. Transport-specific; e.g. subprocess: { command, args?, protocol }; remote: { url, protocol }; wasm: { exports, abi }.
